name: Rubrik Cloud Data Management
description: Integrates with Rubrik CDM REST API for backup management, SLA domain policy enforcement, snapshot monitoring, and recovery operations across hybrid cloud environments

actions.name: List SLA Domains
actions.description: Retrieve all SLA domain policies that define backup frequency, retention, replication, and archival rules

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter SLA domains by name pattern

actions.name: List Protected VMs
actions.description: Retrieve all virtual machines managed by Rubrik with their protection status and SLA domain assignments

parameters.name: effective_sla_domain_id
parameters.description: Filter by assigned SLA domain ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of VMs to return

actions.name: List Filesets
actions.description: Retrieve all fileset configurations for physical server backup

actions.name: Get Job Status
actions.description: Retrieve the status of a specific backup or recovery job by event ID

actions.name: Trigger On-Demand Snapshot
actions.description: Initiate an on-demand backup snapshot for a protected object

parameters.name: vmId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the VM to snapshot

parameters.name: slaId
parameters.description: SLA domain ID to apply for this snapshot (determines retention)

actions.name: List Events
actions.description: Retrieve system events including backup jobs, recovery operations, and system alerts

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by event type (Backup, Recovery, Replication, Archive, System)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by event status (Success, Failure, Running, Queued)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return
